title: Shifted Lens
description: A mod that aims to improve many of Minecraft's mobs and add entirely new ones
body:
![Ghast](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e295d00be726f40e38cea56bd888dc5aa08f46a9.png)
## About Shifted Lens
Shifted Lens aims to improve many of Minecraft's mobs with new mechanics and features.

## Mod Loader and Version
This mod is currently being developed for Forge 1.20.1. No backports are planned. We will port the mod to newer versions when we feel the time is right. For 1.21.1 and beyond, the mod will use NeoForge.
